leadText: The Paralyze Heal (Japanese: まひなおし Paralysis Heal), called Parlyz Heal from Generations I to V, is a type of medicine introduced in Generation I. It can be used to cure a Pokémon from paralysis. In the English manual of Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen, this item is called Paralyz Heal.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it cures a Pokémon from paralysis .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Cures a Pok é mon that is suffering from paralysis. G S C Heals paralyzed Pok é mon . R S E Colo XD Heals a paralyzed Pok é mon . FR LG A spray-type medicine. It heals one Pok é mon from paralysis. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A spray-type medicine. It eliminates paralysis from a single Pokémon. X Y OR AS S M US UM A spray-type medicine for paralysis. It can be used once to free a Pokémon that has been paralyzed. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A spray-type medicine for treating paralysis. It can be used to free a single Pokémon that has been paralyzed. S V ZA A spray-type medicine for treating paralysis. It can be used to free a Pokémon that has been paralyzed.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Conq. Cures paralysis.

Wonder Launcher [ edit | edit source ] The Paralyze Heal appears as a Wonder Launcher item. It costs 4 points to use.
